title: ACG Runtime Trace
description: Structured record of a single `acg run` invocation: orchestrator reasoning + per-group, per-worker proposals validated against the lockfile. Consumed by the visualizer's live-replay mode.

version.description: Schema version of this run trace; bumped on breaking shape changes.

generated_at.description: UTC timestamp when the runtime serialized this trace.

lockfile.description: Path to the agent_lock.json this trace executed against.

config.description: Endpoint and model configuration the runtime invoked.

orch_url.description: Base URL of the orchestrator llama-server instance.

orch_model.description: Model identifier used by the orchestrator endpoint.

sub_url.description: Base URL of the sub-agent llama-server instance.

sub_model.description: Model identifier used by sub-agent workers.

orchestrator.description: Single orchestrator turn that approved or rejected the dispatch plan.

workers.description: Per-task worker proposals, in completion order across all groups.

groups_executed.description: Per-group execution metadata in scheduling order.

started_at.description: UTC timestamp when the runtime began executing the lockfile.

finished_at.description: UTC timestamp when the runtime finished the last group.

total_wall_s.description: End-to-end wall-clock seconds from started_at to finished_at.

OrchestratorResult.description: One orchestrator response captured before worker fan-out.

url.description: Endpoint URL the orchestrator request was sent to.

model.description: Model identifier the orchestrator endpoint reported.

wall_s.description: Wall-clock seconds the orchestrator call took.

completion_tokens.description: Token count consumed by the orchestrator response.

reasoning_content.description: Captured chain-of-thought (empty when the server runs with --reasoning-budget 0).

parsed.description: Optional structured parse of the orchestrator's content.

approved.description: Whether the orchestrator approved the proposed dispatch plan.

concerns.description: Free-form concerns the orchestrator raised about the plan.

dispatch_order.description: Group ids in the order the orchestrator wants them executed.

WorkerResult.description: One sub-agent worker run, including its proposed writes and validation outcomes.

task_id.description: Lockfile task id this worker was assigned.

group_id.description: Execution group this worker belonged to.

url.description: Endpoint URL the worker request was sent to.

model.description: Model identifier the worker endpoint reported.

wall_s.description: Wall-clock seconds the worker call took.

completion_tokens.description: Token count consumed by the worker response.

raw_content.description: Verbatim worker response before proposal parsing.

proposals.description: Parsed write proposals from this worker, in order.

allowed_count.description: Number of proposals that passed validate_write().

blocked_count.description: Number of proposals that validate_write() rejected.

error.description: Error message if the worker call failed; null on success.

Proposal.description: A single file-write proposal emitted by a worker.

file.description: Repo-relative path the worker proposed to modify.

description.description: Worker's short explanation of the intended change.

allowed.description: Whether validate_write() permitted the proposal under allowed_paths.

reason.description: Validator-supplied reason when blocked; null when allowed.

GroupResult.description: Per-group execution metadata captured by the runtime.

id.description: Lockfile group id this entry corresponds to.

type.description: Whether the group's tasks ran concurrently or sequentially.

started_at.description: UTC timestamp when the group began executing.

wall_s.description: Wall-clock seconds the group took, end to end.

worker_ids.description: Task ids of workers dispatched in this group.

items.description: Task id of a worker dispatched in this group.
